basic_details.job_title: DBEO Mirzapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 29 Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Trained Graduate with TET at Upper Primary level, Graduate in specified subject with training, MA/MSc or BA/BSc (Hons) in Math, High School/Intermediate with Science and Lab Diploma, Graduate in Commerce with MS Office, Class 8 pass
qualification.details: Full Time Teacher (Science): Trained Graduate from Science stream and TET at Upper Primary level. Full Time Teacher (Math): Trained Graduate from PCM stream and TET at Upper Primary level. Full Time Teacher (Social Science): Trained Graduate in Geography/History/Civics and TET at Upper Primary level. Full Time Teacher (Hindi): Graduate in Hindi and Sanskrit and TET at Upper Primary level. Full Time Teacher (English): Graduate in English and TET at Upper Primary level. Part Time Teacher (Art Craft and Music/Home Science): Graduate in specified subject with training degree and TET at Upper Primary level. Part Time Teacher (Computer): Trained Graduate with additional PGDCA/BCA/B.Sc Computer Science or DOEACC O/A Level Diploma. Accountant (Female): Graduate in Commerce with MS Office knowledge; preference for DOEACC O Level or equivalent. Head Cook (Female): Passed Class 8; no physical disability or infectious disease. Assistant Cook (Female): Passed Class 8; no physical disability or infectious disease. Peon (Female): Passed Class 8; no physical disability or infectious disease. Watchman (Female): Passed Class 8; no physical disability or infectious disease. PGT Math: MA/MSc in Math or BA/BSc (Hons) with 3-year Math course; trained preferred. Lab Assistant: High School/Intermediate with Science and Laboratory Technician Diploma or equivalent.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Part Time Teacher (Art Craft and Music/Home Science)

salary_details.details: Full Time Teacher (Science, Math, Social Science, Hindi, English): Rs. 25410 Per Month Part Time Teacher (Art Craft and Music/Home Science, Computer): Rs. 12790 Per Month Accountant (Female): Rs. 14357 Per Month Head Cook (Female): Rs. 9006 Per Month Assistant Cook (Female): Rs. 6755 Per Month Peon (Female): Rs. 7505 Per Month Watchman (Female): Rs. 7505 Per Month PGT Math: Rs. 22000 Per Month Lab Assistant: Rs. 7147 Per Month

selection_process: Merit List Interview (for Cooks and Peons/Watchmen) Document Verification Counseling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DBEO Mirzapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://mirzapur.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DBEO Mirzapur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DBEO Mirzapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DBEO Mirzapur Recruitment 2026 is 27th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 29 vacancies are available for various Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts in the District Basic Education Office Mirzapur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 6755 to Rs. 25410 per month, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Teaching posts?
faq.answer: For Teaching posts, qualifications generally include being a Trained Graduate with TET at Upper Primary level, or a Graduate in a specified subject with relevant training, depending on the subject.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DBEO Mirzapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Merit List, Interview (for Cooks and Peons/Watchmen), Document Verification, and Counseling.

faq.question: Q9. Which website should I visit to download the application form and notification?
faq.answer: You can visit the official website of the District Basic Education Office Mirzapur, which is https://mirzapur.nic.in/, to download the application form and the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these posts is contractual.
